column1: Bobby Witt Jr. leads the slate with a strong combination of recent form and reliability, hitting safely in over 80% of games and enjoying a favorable matchup against Anthony Kay. Ivan Herrera also offers appeal, riding a hot stretch at the plate with a clear platoon edge in a hitter-friendly park. Matt Olson, William Contreras, and Luis Arraez round out the top options, each bringing steady contact skills and advantageous matchups for Beat The Streak consideration.
